quote_1: This was such a great experience for me. As someone already in business but looking at a new way of operating and putting my business out there, this workshop helped me with the mindset shift I needed to help focus on getting my business to a new level. Sam is an exceptional coach who has a level of depth not many do when it comes to business. It would be an understatement to say that this workshop was helpful. Thank you so much Sam!
quote_2: Sam offered brilliant insights and practical processes that give greater clarity and confidence for you to navigate your business journey. Was a great opportunity to network too… I would definitely recommend his workshop
quote_3: Sam delivered the workshop with excellence. I left feeling empowered to be able to do more with my business. The nuggets given were priceless and I know that in months to come I will reap what I learnt.
quote_4: I thoroughly enjoyed attending the Business Builder workshop by Mind and Method Academy. It was packed with invaluable insights on developing the right mindset, building a business plan, and understanding marketing and sales. The energy in the room was infectious. Ideas flowed freely and I had the pleasure of connecting with other like-minded business builders. My biggest takeaway? Don't be afraid to raise your prices. Undercharging doesn't just hurt your business. It actually deprives the customers who are ready and willing to pay for the full value you can deliver.
quote_5: I attended the Business Builder workshop last week and I couldn’t believe all the information I received was for free. I went there struggling to take my business to the next stage, but those couple hours at the workshop gave me practical tools needed to do so. I was even lucky enough to hear about the innovative AI tools which would help streamline the processes of my Business. I highly recommend attending if you have any questions about your current business or one you’re interested in starting in the future.
quote_6: I found the Business Builder workshop clear and informative. I came away with useful tips I can't wait to use in my business. I'd highly recommend it.
quote_7: I didn’t know what to expect, if I’m honest not sure if I expected anything at all but this was the push and encouragement I needed to go full throttle on my business. Sam helped me find clarity and also discover other things I needed to understand to turn my business from a small side hustle into a full blown brand that can bring me the income I desire. Sam is incredibly knowledgeable and passionate about what he does and I think that’s what makes Mind and Method Academy work!
quote_8: Sam tells it like it is. He will help move the dial with your business goals, through encouragement, strategic advice, smart positing, solid input and refinement of execution. His authenticity lends itself to build trust with him, and faith in your ability to accomplish. He is a true pleasure to work with, I recommend him highly.
quote_9: I attended the Business Builder workshop and it was fantastic! Very informative and full of key tips that are necessary when launching and growing your business. I highly recommend for anyone who needs that extra support in starting their own business!
